title: Nested for loops with SystemVerilog loop variables crashes compiler
body:
To reproduce (-g2012):
```verilog
module test;
  initial
    for(int i=0;i<10;i++)
      for(int j=0;j<10;j++)
        #10 $display(i,j);
endmodule
```
The compiler hangs up for a while and then crashes:
```
sh: line 1: 20533 Done                    /usr/lib64/ivl/ivlpp -L -F"/tmp/ivrlg23001898e" -f"/tmp/ivrlg3001898e" -p"/tmp/ivrli3001898e"
     20534 Segmentation fault      (core dumped) | /usr/lib64/ivl/ivl -C"/tmp/ivrlh3001898e" -C"/usr/lib64/ivl/vvp.conf" -- -
```
